name: pbk-command-center
description: PBK Wholesale Paradise command-center design and implementation guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Keep PBK feature work inside the existing command-center design.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local plugin that anchors future PBK UI and BrowserOS work to the existing Bloomberg-style command-center system instead of allowing redesign drift.
defaultPrompt: Add a small PBK feature without changing the overall design.
Place BrowserOS inside the Brain lane and existing tooling cards.
Use the PBK command-center references before touching UI.
